title: Generic LRU Cache
description: Implement a generic LRU cache using Go 1.18+ generics with TTL support and concurrent access safety.
requirements: Type must be named 'Cache[K comparable, V any]'
Implement NewCache[K, V](capacity int) returning *Cache[K, V]
Implement Get(key K) (V, bool) returning value and found flag
Implement Put(key K, value V) adding or updating entry
Implement PutWithTTL(key K, value V, ttl time.Duration)
Evict least recently used when at capacity

few_shot_examples.prompt: Move accessed item to front of LRU list.
